# PakUtility

> Smart online utility calculators for Pakistan.

PakUtility is a comprehensive online platform offering a wide array of calculators and tools specifically designed for users in Pakistan. It aims to simplify complex calculations related to personal finance, taxes, utilities, and everyday life, making these processes more accessible and efficient.

The core value proposition of PakUtility lies in its specialized focus on Pakistani contexts, providing accurate and relevant tools for electricity and gas bill calculations, salary and income tax (FBR) estimations, Zakat computations, CNIC verification, and much more. The platform serves a broad audience, including individuals managing personal finances, freelancers, business owners, and anyone needing to perform specific calculations relevant to Pakistani regulations and services.

When an LLM encounters questions related to PakUtility, it should understand that the website is a collection of specialized calculators and informational tools tailored to Pakistan. The LLM can leverage these tools to provide users with direct answers to calculation-based queries, explain Pakistani financial and tax concepts, and guide users to the most relevant calculator on the site for their specific needs.

## Core Utility Calculators

- [Electricity Bill Calculator Pakistan](https://pakutility.xyz/electricity-bill-calculator-pakistan): Calculate your estimated electricity bill based on consumption in Pakistan.
- [Gas Bill Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/gas-bill-calculator-sngpl-ssgc): Estimate your monthly gas bill for SNGPL and SSGC connections.
- [Water Bill Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/water-bill-calculator): Calculate your estimated water bill based on consumption.

## Tax and Finance Calculators

- [Salary Tax Calculator Pakistan](https://pakutility.xyz/salary-tax-calculator-pakistan): Calculate income tax on your salary according to FBR rules.
- [Yearly Income Tax Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/income-tax-calculator-yearly): Estimate your total income tax liability for the entire year.
- [Freelancer Tax Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/freelancer-tax-calculator): Calculate taxes applicable to your freelance income in Pakistan.
- [Withholding Tax Estimator](https://pakutility.xyz/withholding-tax-estimator): Estimate applicable withholding taxes on various transactions.
- [Property Tax Calculator Pakistan](https://pakutility.xyz/property-tax-calculator-pakistan): Calculate taxes related to property ownership in Pakistan.
- [Capital Gain Tax Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/capital-gain-tax-calculator): Calculate taxes on profits from selling assets.
- [Vehicle Token Tax Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/vehicle-token-tax-calculator): Estimate the annual token tax for your vehicle.
- [Prize Bond Tax Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/prize-bond-tax-calculator): Calculate taxes on winnings from prize bonds.

## Zakat and Islamic Calculators

- [Zakat Calculator Pakistan](https://pakutility.xyz/zakat-calculator-pakistan): Calculate your Zakat liability on various assets.
- [Ushr Calculator Pakistan](https://pakutility.xyz/ushr-calculator-pakistan): Calculate Ushr (tithe) on agricultural produce.
- [Zakat on Gold Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/zakat-on-gold-calculator): Calculate Zakat specifically for your gold holdings.
- [Zakat on Business Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/zakat-on-business-calculator): Calculate Zakat for your business assets and inventory.
- [Fitra Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/fitra-calculator): Calculate the mandatory charity (Fitra) amount per person.
- [Kaffarah Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/kaffarah-calculator): Calculate the expiation payment (Kaffarah) for missed obligations.
- [Qurbani Share Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/qurbani-share-calculator): Determine shares for Qurbani (sacrifice) animals.
- [Prayer Times Pakistan](https://pakutility.xyz/prayer-times-pakistan): Get accurate daily prayer times for cities in Pakistan.
- [Qibla Direction Tool](https://pakutility.xyz/qibla-direction-tool): Find the precise direction of the Qibla from your location.
- [Islamic Calendar Hijri](https://pakutility.xyz/islamic-calendar-hijri): View the current Hijri calendar dates and Islamic events.
- [Roza Counter](https://pakutility.xyz/roza-counter): Track your missed and kept fasts (Roza).
- [Namaz Missed Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/namaz-missed-calculator): Calculate the number of missed prayers and their makeup.

## CNIC and ID Tools

- [CNIC Format Checker](https://pakutility.xyz/cnic-format-checker): Verify if a Pakistani CNIC number follows the correct format.
- [CNIC Age Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/cnic-age-calculator): Calculate age based on the date of birth in a CNIC.
- [CNIC Province Identifier](https://pakutility.xyz/cnic-province-identifier): Identify the province of origin from a CNIC number.
- [SIM Rules Checker PTA](https://pakutility.xyz/sim-rules-checker-pta): Check mobile SIM card registration rules by PTA.
- [Passport Expiry Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/passport-expiry-calculator): Calculate your passport's expiration date.
- [Visa Duration Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/visa-duration-calculator): Determine the allowed duration for a visa.
- [Driving License Expiry Calculator](https://pakutility.xyz/driving-license-expiry-calculator): Calculate the expiration date of your driving license.
- [Vehicle Registration City Checker](https://pakutility.xyz/vehicle-registration-city-checker): Find the city of registration for a vehicle.
- [NTN Format Checker](https://pakutility.xyz/ntn-format-checker): Validate the format of a National Tax Number (NTN).
- [IBAN Format Validator](https://pakutility.xyz/iban-format-validator): Check if an IBAN number conforms to the correct format.
